title: Fix principal audit gate false overdue cadence counting
problem: principal_audit_gate counts all Phase 2 done tickets (order > 33) after any principal audit, ignoring post-ticket checkpoint reports. This produces false overdue signals in the operator loop even when a valid principal audit exists after ticket-042.
acceptance_criteria: post-ticket-NNN principal audit reports count only done tickets after ticket-NNN.
pre-phase-N principal audits count only done tickets after the phase boundary ticket.
Premature post-ticket principal audits (referenced ticket not done) are ignored.
Three done tickets after the latest valid checkpoint still triggers overdue.
Medium/high-risk tickets without pre-ticket audit remain blocked.
Operator loop reflects corrected cadence status.
Golden tests and default pytest pass without Ollama.
non_goals: Do not weaken medium/high-risk pre-ticket audit requirements.
Do not change live smoke, LLM mode, ticket promotion, or export behavior.
Do not implement ticket-045 improvement draft promotion.
rollback_plan: Revert the ticket-044 branch; gate reverts to legacy order>33 principal counting.
